name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us squash bugs and improve the Core/GUI interface
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug, needs-triage
assignees: ''

---

## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 👣 Steps to Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Launch mode/GUI via '...'
2. Target configuration set to '...'
3. Click on '...'
4. See error

## 🎯 Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## 📸 Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add terminal log outputs or GUI screenshots to help explain your problem.

## 💻 Environment

- **OS**: [e.g. Linux Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11]
- **Installation Method**: [e.g. AppImage, Portable ZIP, Source Pip]
- **Python Version**: [e.g. 3.11.8]
- **GUI Mode**: [e.g. Active, Passive Simulation]

## 🛡️ Bounty Scope / Ethics Verification

- [ ] I confirm this issue occurred in authorized test environments or local demo simulations.
